description_long: This is a rectangular, modern cabinet or shelf unit with a light wood finish and black trim outlining its edges. The structure features two prominent horizontal slots on the front, suggesting the presence of drawers or pull-out compartments. The sides are open, revealing a spacious interior shelf that runs the length of the unit, making it suitable for storage or display. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and smooth, ideal for placing additional items. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible handles or decorative elements. Its sturdy construction and neutral color palette make it suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet or shelf with a light wood finish, black trim, and open sides revealing a spacious interior shelf. Features two horizontal slots on the front, suggesting drawers.
description_view_0: The front view shows two horizontal slots, likely indicating drawers, framed by black trim on a light wood surface.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the open structure with a large interior shelf and the absence of side panels, showing the full depth of the unit.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, with the same two horizontal slots and black trim, maintaining symmetry.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again displays the open structure and interior shelf, identical to the other side.
